network.title: Network Connection
network.description: Enter your connection details. After submitting, the integration will scan for sensors (this takes about 60 seconds).

serial.title: USB Serial Connection
serial.description: Enter your connection details. After submitting, the integration will scan for sensors (this takes about 60 seconds).

sensors.title: Select Sensors
sensors.description: The heater reported the sensors below with their current values. Select which ones you want to monitor.

access_mode.title: Access Mode
access_mode.description: Enable write mode to control heater parameters from Home Assistant. WARNING: Incorrect values could affect heater operation. Only enable if you understand the risks. If enabled, the integration will scan for writable parameters (this takes about 30 seconds).

parameters.title: Select Parameters
parameters.description: The following writable parameters were found. Select which ones you want to control. For safety, none are selected by default.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heater. Check your connection settings and cables.
error.no_sensors: Connected successfully but no sensors were found.

init.title: Fröling Heater Options
init.description: Adjust polling interval and sensor selection.
